name: mid-offtopic
cv:
Davor Mestrovic
Software Engineer

Glasshouse Media (2020-present) - Backend Engineer
- Maintains the content-ingestion pipeline (Go), ~500 publishers feeding in daily.
- Built a deduplication step that cut storage costs by roughly 20%.
- Set up the team's first integration-test suite.

Quanta Retail (2018-2020) - Software Engineer
- Worked on the inventory-sync service.

Education: BSc Information Systems, 2018.

Skills: Go, PostgreSQL, Redis, gRPC, AWS.
posting: Backend Engineer, Glasshouse Media. Own and evolve our content pipeline, handle scale and reliability, and collaborate across teams. We value initiative, clear ownership, and grace under ambiguity. Stack: Go, gRPC, PostgreSQL, AWS. 3-6 years.
profile: Capable engineer who consistently drifts off the question - asked about a conflict, he'll describe the architecture instead; asked for a result, he'll pivot to an unrelated project he's prouder of. Not evasive on purpose, just poor at staying on the asked topic. The dedicated off-topic termination fixture: a persistent drifter the guardrail redirects once, then ends the session on the next off-topic reply.
